programmes.show_description: Step into spring with New Season Fashion from Izabel London. Discover stylish looks and fresh trends to update your wardrobe effortlessly. Tune in for inspiration and must-have pieces!

Start your day with Live Well: The Morning Show. Discover uplifting tips, wellness inspiration, and must-have products to energise your morning and boost your wellbeing.
Every Wednesday at 11am here on QVC Style we'll be offering hints, tips and advice on looking your best, along with another look at fabulous fashion from the Morning Style show with Kathy.
Create a warm and cosy sanctuary in your home, with the Cozee Home range of snuggly bedding, throws and accessories offering comfort and coziness in your home.
Find the best in health and fitness products to give you a spring in your step and a healthier lifestyle. From top tips and great gadgets, we'll help you to revitalise your daily routine.
Elevate your style with Izabel London. Discover chic, versatile fashion pieces to refresh your wardrobe, all at 1PM!

White Stuff New Spring Fashion.
Whatever size your garden is, create the perfect place to relax and hide away in. We've got a gorgeous selection of stylish outdoor furniture, garden decorations and more.
Enliven your wardrobe with Izabel London's new season of style, offering gorgeous fashion in inclusive sizing. Feel fabulous every day with this cutting-edge collection.
Showcase of Australian born, based and owned brand EMU that has passionately produced the world's finest premium sheepskin and Merino wool products for over 20 years.
White Stuff New Spring Fashion.
In 1968, a beauty editor asked a dermatologist 'can great skin be created?' and Clinique was born. Formulated for maximum results without irritation, their skincare and make-up is still love by many.
Discover the world of Oisha - elegant jewellery that you'll treasure forever. Exquisitely crafted in India, each captivating piece will sit on your skin as a work of art in breath-taking detail.
Ultrasun have the answer to your summer holidays with once-a-day suncare protection. Tune in to find out which product is best for you and your family all year round.
